note: .env only. Pure parameter change — no code changes. All thresholds are read at process startup from env vars defined in core/risk.py lines 28-33.

context.problem: Current exit thresholds are too loose. TP at +85% means the bot holds through most of a game's price swing before exiting. SL at -20% means taking a large loss before cutting. Trailing stop activates at +15% with 20% drawdown tolerance — that's a wide band.

current_values.AUTO_TAKE_PROFIT_PCT: 0.85  (exit when held price is +85% above entry)
current_values.AUTO_STOP_LOSS_PCT: 0.20   (exit when held price is -20% below entry)
current_values.NEAR_RESOLUTION_PRICE: 0.92 (exit when held price >= 92¢ — leaving 8¢ on the table)

context.user_intent: Tighten stops and take profits more aggressively on in-progress wins. Ride guaranteed wins (NEAR_RESOLUTION) less aggressively — raise threshold so we don't close at 92¢ when resolution at 100¢ is imminent.

AUTO_TAKE_PROFIT_PCT.rationale: Take profits when up 40% on entry. For a 40¢ entry, TP at 56¢. Captures meaningful in-game price movement without overstaying. The separate NEAR_RESOLUTION_PRICE handles near-certain wins.

AUTO_STOP_LOSS_PCT.rationale: Cut losses at -12% instead of -20%. For a 50¢ entry, SL at 44¢ instead of 40¢. Reduces max loss per trade by 40%.

NEAR_RESOLUTION_PRICE.rationale: Ride near-certain wins longer. 97¢ vs 92¢ captures another 5¢ per contract (~$3-6 per position). At 97¢ the outcome is effectively decided. Also aligns with the planned game-aware exit (EXIT_GAME_AWARE_001) which will hold Final-state wins all the way to 1.00.

TRAILING_STOP_ACTIVATE_PCT.rationale: Arm the trailing stop sooner — at +10% gain rather than +15%.

TRAILING_STOP_DRAWDOWN_PCT.rationale: Tighter drawdown from peak before triggering. Match the new SL percentage.

steps: Restart bot_core.py after .env change (process reads these at startup)
Check next bot loop log: confirm new thresholds appear in any check_exit evaluations
verification.note: Process restart required for .env changes to take effect. Coordinate with operator.

do_not: Edit risk.py, bot_core.py, or any code file
Change MAX_CONCURRENT_TRADES or confidence thresholds (separate concern)
